name: Kganya Backend Dispatch (Legacy Monolith Reference)
notes: Legacy reference only. The active implementation is split across workflows/*.md and exports/*.json.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  clerk_org_id AS "clerkOrgId",
  name,
  slug,
  status
FROM organizations
WHERE id = '{{$json.normalizedJobs[0].organization.id}}'
  AND clerk_org_id = '{{$json.normalizedJobs[0].organization.clerkOrgId}}'
  AND status = 'active'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  ij.id AS "jobId",
  ij.organization_id AS "organizationId",
  ij.knowledge_source_id AS "knowledgeSourceId",
  ij.source_record_id AS "sourceRecordId",
  ks.id AS "knowledgeSource.id",
  ks.source_key AS "knowledgeSource.sourceKey",
  ks.source_family AS "knowledgeSource.sourceFamily",
  ks.source_type AS "knowledgeSource.sourceType",
  ks.title AS "knowledgeSource.title",
  ks.canonical_ref AS "knowledgeSource.canonicalRef",
  ks.original_uri AS "knowledgeSource.originalUri",
  ks.original_path AS "knowledgeSource.originalPath",
  sr.id AS "sourceRecord.id",
  sr.record_key AS "sourceRecord.recordKey",
  sr.topic AS "sourceRecord.topic",
  sr.source_kind AS "sourceRecord.sourceKind",
  sr.title AS "sourceRecord.title",
  sr.body_markdown AS "sourceRecord.bodyMarkdown",
  sr.body_json AS "sourceRecord.bodyJson",
  sr.source_url AS "sourceRecord.sourceUrl",
  sr.source_anchor AS "sourceRecord.sourceAnchor",
  sr.version AS "sourceRecord.version",
  sr.checksum AS "sourceRecord.checksum",
  (
    SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(field_row ORDER BY field_order), '[]'::json)
    FROM (
      SELECT
        field_name AS field_name,
        field_value AS field_value,
        field_type AS field_type,
        field_order AS field_order,
        is_key AS is_key
      FROM source_record_fields
      WHERE source_record_id = sr.id
      ORDER BY field_order ASC
    ) field_row
  ) AS "sourceRecord.fields",
  (
    SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(chunk_row ORDER BY chunk_index), '[]'::json)
    FROM (
      SELECT
        chunk_index AS chunk_index,
        chunk_type AS chunk_type,
        source_family AS source_family,
        topic AS topic,
        title AS title,
        section_path AS section_path,
        chunk_text AS chunk_text,
        chunk_hash AS chunk_hash,
        active AS active
      FROM document_chunks
      WHERE source_record_id = sr.id
      ORDER BY chunk_index ASC
    ) chunk_row
  ) AS "sourceRecord.chunks"
FROM ingestion_jobs ij
JOIN knowledge_sources ks ON ks.id = ij.knowledge_source_id
JOIN source_records sr ON sr.id = ij.source_record_id
WHERE ij.organization_id = '{{$json.organization.id}}'
  AND ij.job_type = 'embedding'
  AND ij.state = 'pending'
ORDER BY ij.created_at ASC;

WITH input_rows AS (
  SELECT
    '{{$json.sourceRecordId}}'::uuid AS source_record_id,
    '{{$json.organizationId}}'::uuid AS organization_id,
    '{{$json.knowledgeSourceId}}'::uuid AS knowledge_source_id,
    {{$json.version}}::int AS version,
    chunk.value->>'chunkIndex' AS chunk_index,
    chunk.value->>'chunkType' AS chunk_type,
    chunk.value->>'sourceFamily' AS source_family,
    chunk.value->>'topic' AS topic,
    chunk.value->>'title' AS title,
    NULLIF(chunk.value->>'sectionPath', '') AS section_path,
    chunk.value->>'chunkText' AS chunk_text,
    chunk.value->>'chunkHash' AS chunk_hash,
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(chunk.value->>'active', 'true') = 'true' THEN true ELSE false END AS active,
    COALESCE(chunk.value->>'embeddingModel', 'pending') AS embedding_model
  FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{$json.chunks}}'::jsonb) AS chunk(value)
), retired_rows AS (
  UPDATE document_chunks
  SET active = false,
      retired_at = NOW(),
      updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE source_record_id = '{{$json.sourceRecordId}}'::uuid
    AND version <> {{$json.version}}::int
    AND active = true
  RETURNING id
), upsert_rows AS (
  INSERT INTO document_chunks (
    id,
    organization_id,
    knowledge_source_id,
    source_record_id,
    version,
    chunk_index,
    chunk_type,
    source_family,
    topic,
    title,
    section_path,
    chunk_text,
    chunk_hash,
    embedding,
    embedding_model,
    active,
    created_at,
    updated_at
  )
  SELECT
    gen_random_uuid(),
    organization_id,
    knowledge_source_id,
    source_record_id,
    version,
    chunk_index::int,
    chunk_type,
    source_family,
    topic,
    title,
    section_path,
    chunk_text,
    chunk_hash,
    NULL,
    embedding_model,
    active,
    NOW(),
    NOW()
  FROM input_rows
  ON CONFLICT (organization_id, source_record_id, version, chunk_index)
  DO UPDATE SET
    knowledge_source_id = EXCLUDED.knowledge_source_id,
    chunk_type = EXCLUDED.chunk_type,
    source_family = EXCLUDED.source_family,
    topic = EXCLUDED.topic,
    title = EXCLUDED.title,
    section_path = EXCLUDED.section_path,
    chunk_text = EXCLUDED.chunk_text,
    chunk_hash = EXCLUDED.chunk_hash,
    active = EXCLUDED.active,
    updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM upsert_rows) AS written_count,
  0::int AS updated_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM retired_rows) AS retired_count;

UPDATE ingestion_jobs
SET state = 'completed',
    finished_at = NOW(),
    output_checksum = COALESCE(output_checksum, '{{$json.checksum}}'),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{$json.jobId}}'::uuid
RETURNING id AS "jobId", state, started_at AS "startedAt", finished_at AS "finishedAt", retry_count AS "retryCount";

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $json;
return [{ json: { batchId: body.batchId || body.jobId, received: true, acceptedCount: 1, rejectedCount: 0, queuedCount: 1, completedCount: 1, failedCount: 0, errors: [], checksum: body.checksum || 'pending' } }];

const error = $json.error || $json;
return [{ json: { batchId: $json.batchId || null, received: true, acceptedCount: 0, rejectedCount: 1, queuedCount: 0, completedCount: 0, failedCount: 1, errors: [{ code: error.code || 'WORKFLOW_ERROR', message: error.message || 'Unhandled workflow error', jobId: $json.jobId || null }], checksum: $json.checksum || null } }];
